text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I'm walking down the academy
promenade when I spot Admire Vega standing
still.

text_block_list.name: Kittens
text_block_list.text: Meeeow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow her gaze and spot two kittens that look
like siblings wrestling. Admire Vega looks more
relaxed than usual as she watches them.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean... I don't hate them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that said, Admire Vega promptly walks away
before I can say anything else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that evening...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She hasn't returned yet... But I didn't see her over there
either...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No one... I'm just taking a walk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but her eyes trail over to a small
kitten who looks back at her and meows.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I haven't seen her little sister since lunch.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
She's probably just gone for a walk or looking for
food...
choice_data_list: Would you like me to help you look for her?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why are you offering?
choice_data_list:
Because the more people there are, the easier
it'll be to find her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...All right.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! Finding a little kitten or two will
be no problem at all with the Centurial Overlord
at your side!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Mr. Tanuki, here's something with the kitten's
scent. Can you detect it anywhere else?

text_block_list.name: Tanuki
text_block_list.text: Snort, snort.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I know having more people will make the search more efficient, but... did you have to invite these two?
choice_data_list:
I thought it'd be easier to work with people you
already know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Just don't come crying to me when things get out
of hand.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come out from your hiding, Christine! ♪ I'm here,
nothing can harm you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Mr. Tanuki! This isn't the lost kitten—this is your
dinner!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Are you here? You can come out now.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She's not here either...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all split up in search of the missing kitten until
finally...

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Meeeow.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh. Is that the kitten we're looking for, there on
top of the stage?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've found you, Christine! Your angelic serenade is
such sweet music to my ears!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stop calling her that. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Stop calling her that. Geez...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I guess.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Anyway... Thanks for helping me out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As they say, all's well that ends well! Now allow
me to express the overwhelming joy hidden in
Ayabe's heart! In song form, of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
La-la-laaa! ♪ My heart dances, you found your
beloved,
Rose petals of joy bloom around the world! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Stop that. Anyway, we found the kitten, so I'm
leaving now.

text_block_list.name: Kittens
text_block_list.text: Meeeow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. I'm glad you didn't end up
separated.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You girls be good now and stick together, okay?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You always come to my rescue when I make
silly mistakes too.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Enough of that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm just...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...Forget it. We found the kitten, so I'm leaving
now.

text_block_list.name: Kittens
text_block_list.text: Meeeow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome. I'm glad you didn't end up
separated.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You girls be good now and stick together, okay?
